zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Barbara Jennings於1524年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾阿炳頓時，她的父親Thomas Jennens-36歲，母親Lady Alice Bright*8歲。她於1544年與William Branch在英國波克夏阿炳頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和16個女兒的父母。她去世於1597年8月25日在英國波克夏阿炳頓享年73歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Barbara Jennings于1524年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾阿炳頓时，她的父亲Thomas Jennens-36岁，母亲Lady Alice Bright*8岁。她于1544年与William Branch在英国波克夏阿炳頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和16个女儿的父母。她去世于1597年8月25日在英国波克夏阿炳頓享年73岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Jennings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Jenning , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
German: patronymic from a pet form (see Jenning ) of the personal name Johannes (see John ).

variants.name: Jenning
meanings: German: patronymic from a shortened form of the personal name Johann(es) (see John ).
English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Jenin, Janin, pet forms of John , with -in altered to -ing.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Barbara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

variants.name: Barbra
meanings: From Latin, meaning ‘foreign woman’ (a feminine form of barbarus ‘foreign’, from Greek, referring originally to the unintelligible chatter of foreigners, which sounded to the Greek ear like no more than bar-bar). St Barbara has always been one of the most popular saints in the calendar, although there is some doubt whether she ever actually existed. According to legend, she was imprisoned in a tower and later murdered by her father, who was then struck down by a bolt of lightning. Accordingly, she is the patron of architects, stonemasons, and fortifications, and of firework makers, artillerymen, and gunpowder magazines.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Barbara Jennings was born in 1524, in Abington, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Thomas Jennens, was -36 and her mother, Lady Alice Bright*, was 8. She married William Branch in 1544, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 16 daughters. She died on 25 August 1597, in Abingdon, Berkshire, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Barbara Jenningsが1524年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアアビントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Jennensは-36歳，母Lady Alice Bright*は8歳であった。1544年にイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンでWilliam Branchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と16人の娘の親であった。彼女は1597年8月25日にイギリスバークシュアイアアビングドンで73歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアベル オフ ウィト ホールゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Barbara Jennings(이)가 1524년 영국 노르섬프토실르 압잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Jennens(은)는 -36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice Bright*(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 1544년 영국 버크실르 압잉던에서 William Branch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1597년 8월 25일 영국 버크실르 압잉던에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Barbara Jennings nasceu em 1524, em Abington, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Jennens, tinha -36 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Bright*, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com William Branch em 1544, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 16 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1597, em Abingdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Barbara Jennings родилась в 1524 г. в местности абингтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Jennens было -36 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Bright*, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Branch в 1544 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 16 дочерей. Она умерла 25 августа 1597 г. в местности абингдон, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия.
